docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $723.92 FILED BY SIINO JOE AS TO DEFENDANT EZE DAMIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-17-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT EZE DAMIAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIINO JOE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EZE DAMIAN $723.92 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $738.92, JUDGMENT ONLY REFLECTS NOV'93 RENT AND LATE CHARGE CT DID NOT CONSIDER ANY EVIDENCE RE-SEC DEPOSIT OR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT EZE DAMIAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EZE DAMIAN
